author: Gavin Picard
description: An all-in-one solution for folder icons and coloring, featuring auto-gradients. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Gavin Picard
manifest.description: An all-in-one solution for folder icons and coloring, featuring auto-gradients.
manifest.name: Iconocolor

name: Iconocolor

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### New
- Release builds are now signed with GitHub artifact attestations, so `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` can be cryptographically verified back to this repository's CI.

### Changes
- Swapped the unzip library used by the icon-pack downloader from JSZip to fflate, cutting the bundled plugin size roughly in half (~199 KB → ~107 KB).
- Added a "Data and Privacy" section to the README clarifying that the plugin only reads/writes inside `.obsidian/icons/` and only makes network requests when you explicitly download an icon pack.

### Fixes
- Addressed all findings from the Obsidian plugin reviewer scorecard. Brought hex-color and example placeholders into sentence-case compliance, and dropped the `builtin-modules` dev dependency in favor of Node's built-in module list.
releases.name: Iconocolor 1.2.1

releases.author: gavinpicard
releases.description:
### New
- Switch color palette command in the command palette, with a modal showing each palette's name and color swatches.
- JSZip bundled with the plugin. Icon-pack downloads no longer require a runtime fetch of a third-party CDN script.

### Changes
- Addition of color picker to color palette creation
- Native confirmation modal replaces the browser's window.confirm() dialog when deleting an icon pack.
- minAppVersion bumped from 0.15.0 → 1.6.6

### Fixes
- Icon pack dropdown in folder modal no longer shows a duplicate "Custom" entry, and the URL-entry field correctly disappears after switching away from "Custom."
- Settings tab no longer flickers when icon packs are downloaded/deleted or when default-icon rules are added/removed/toggled. The relevant list re-renders on its own instead of rebuilding the whole tab.
- Palette editor no longer steals focus after every keystroke.
- All hardcoded .obsidian/icons/ paths now derive from app.vault.configDir, so the plugin works correctly for users with a non-default config folder.
- SVG content is now parsed safely via DOMParser + importNode and stripped of any <script> tags rather than being assigned to innerHTML.
- Icon filename sanitizer correctly strips ASCII control characters (\x00–\x1f).
releases.name: Iconocolor 1.2.0

releases.author: gavinpicard
releases.description:
- New and improved Folder Config Modal (more clear relationships, ability to "revert")
- Improved UI/UX, consistent text styling
- Various bug fixes/compliance changes
releases.name: Iconocolor 1.1.0

releases.author: gavinpicard
releases.description:
Initial release of Iconocolor. Features included:
- Set icons for folders
- Set background, icon, and text color for folders.
- Auto-coloring using gradients
- "Transformation" system for colors. Folders have "base" color which can be transformed. I.E. text is 10% lighter than base color, or child's base color is 10% lighter than parent's
- Setting profiles
- Global icon sizing option
- Downloadable icon packs
- Regex-pattern based auto-icons
releases.name: Iconocolor 1.0.0
